titleStmt.title: SII 35.61: original edition by D. M. Nagaraju
No. 61. (A.R. No. 15 of 1950-51.) GŌLIHAḶḶI, KHANAPUR TALUK, BELGAUM DISTRICT.

summary.p: Slab set up near Siddhaliṅga temple.

This damaged record refers to the reign of Bhulōkamalla Sōmēśvara IV and states that Permāḍidēva, the Kadaṁba chief of Goa and his mother Maiḷaladēvī were ruling from their capital at Gōve. The record is dated the Kaliyuga year 4283, Manmatha, Phālguṇa śu 13, Thursday. The details of date are very irregular. The given tithi in the Kaliyuga year 4283, corresponded to 1183 A.D., February 7, Monday, when the cyclic year was Śubhakṛit. If we consider the cyclic year, the details would correspond to 1176 A.D., February 24, Tuesday. It is difficult to identify Bhulōkamalla of this record.

The earlier portion of the record which gives a genealogical account of the Kadaṁbas of Goa refers also to Vijayāditya, the younger brother of Permāḍi, as ruling along with his brother. It further discloses the fact that Maiḷalamahādēvī was the daughter of Malayamatīdēvī and Vikramāditya VI.

It registers gifts of land, house-site and oilmill by Malliseṭṭi, Dēviseṭṭi and Madhuraseṭṭi sons of Gangiseṭṭi to the basadi got built by the latter at Kiru Saṁpagāḍi. It also registers gifts of income from taxes etc. by the Five hundred. These gifts were made over to Vāsūpūjya-bhaṭṭāraka, of Mulasaṁgha and Baḷagāragaṇa, disciple of Nēmichandra-bhaṭṭāraka whose lineage is described. The gifts were made on the occasion of a lunar eclipse. The record refers to a mahāpradhāna, haḍapavaḷa etc., of the Kadaṁba chiefs. But his name is lost.

revisionDesc.change: Conversion of digital encoding to DHARMA encoding scheme according to EGD (Encoding Guide for Diplomatic Editions)

div.p:
śrīmatparamagaṁbhīrasyādvādāmōghalāṁchanaṁ jīyātraiḷōkyanāthasya śāsanaṁ jinaśāsanaṁ .
svasti samastabhuvanāśrayaṁ śrīprithvīvallabhaṁ mahārājādhirājaṁ paramēśvara paramabhaṭṭāraka satyāśrayakuḷa
tiḷakaṁ cāḷukyābharaṇaṁ śrīmadubhūlōkamalladēvaravijayarājyamuttarōttarābhi vṛddhi pravarddha
mānamācaṁdrārkkatāraṁbaraṁ saluttamire . śrīmaccaḻukyavaṁsasikhāmaṇi bhūlōkamallanī dhareyaṁ
diksāmajame sīmeyāgemahanmahimaṁ pāḷisuttamirepalakāla . tatpādapadumōpajīvi jēṣṭa kadaṁ
bānvayadoḷu . laṁkege kappamaṁ munidu bēḍi bahitramanēṟi nūṁkidaṁ koṁkaṇacakravartthi vibhu caṭṭaya pe
naluke vikramāḷaṁkaraṇaṁge laṁkeya vibhīsaṇanaṭṭidaneyde kappamaṁ saṁkeyineṁdaḍā mōnnati
yaṁ pogaḷaluke ballarār . tatsuta . jayalakṣmīvallabhaṁ kṣatriyakuḷadīpakaṁ śauryya gāṁbhīryyadhairyyani
śrīyanīśa śrīpadāṁbōruhamadhurarasāsvādabhriṁgaṁ kadaṁbānvaya rājyaśrī manō nanu
pamasauryyasaṁpaṁnnarūpaṁ jayakēsi śrīmahīpāḷakanenenegaḷdaṁ vīralakṣmīviḷāsaṁ . tattanūbhava . tanuvaṁ
vaṁdya catige dhanamaṁ brajākarṇnaneṁba nīnugrāṁtakaneṁbaniṁ paḍeduda tāṁ gaṁḍarādityana naṁtacittame pōluvanaṁtavīra
nītaṁ kīrtthimārtthaṁḍaneṁdana vāṁtiṟiveḷeyiṁ vijayādityāvanīpāḷakaṁ . tadapatyaṁ jayakēsidēvanesedirddaṁ tyāgasiṁghāsa
nāmuditaṁ śrīramaṇaṁ caḷukyanripajātanūtakāṁtasukhā vairibaḷavanmātaṁga kuṁbhasthaḷabidurōdphanavrā
nāgarājanūrjjitayasa lōkaikaḷpadruma . * . samadhigatapaṁcamahāśabda mahāmaṇḍaḷēsvara banavāsipuravarādhīsvaraṁ
samastabhuva stūyamānyaharadharaṇīsutaṁ triḷōcanakadaṁbānvayamā ma hōdaya mahīdharēṁdrasukharābhyudaya
mānapracaṁṇḍamārtaṇḍakarāḷātitībranijapratāpavasīkritasakaḷamahīmaṇḍa ḷaṁ permmaṭṭi tūryyanirgghōsaṇa caturāsīti
nagarādhiṣṭhitāmaṣṭādasayajñadīkṣādīkṣitakuḷaprasūtanu tyāgajhagajaṁpajhaṁpaḷā cāryya subhaṭakanakanikaṣō
paḷa saraṇāgatavajraprākāra nāmādi sakaḷā kāsa tarappa śrīmajjayakēsidēvaṁ sukhavirppaṁdu Ā vibhu
vinasati dēvigamatyadhikaṁ negaḻdaruṁdhatige migilu sāvitrige maiḷaladēviyenenalu mikkadiṁ
janakaṁ caḷukya permmāḍinripāḷaṁ malayamatimahādēvi jagajjananute petta tāyi tanagene maiḷaladēviyantunōnturu
mōḷarē . kuḷavadhuve nalumeyiṁ maiḷaladēvige tatupriyanī jayakēśimahītaḷapatige puṭṭidarbhbhūtaḷanātarvīra
permmāḍi vijayādityaru . Intivarssukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamiralu nāgarasaṁ paguḍiyataḷa muṁtā
yagaḷu Aṟuvatokkalu Eṁṭuhiṭṭu kāraṇaṁgaḷu mukhyavāgiyavaranumatadi kiṟusaṁpagāḍiyalu Aṁ
gaḍiya malliśeṭṭiyaru gorkkāmaseṭṭiyaru gaṁgiseṭṭiyaru māḍisida basadi . Avara tadanvayada kramada guruga
ḷu . śrī jinasāntika modalādī mūḷasaṁghaṁ niraṁtaramā saṁtati naṁdisaṁgha ttire saṁ
darvvaṟirggāṟa mukhyagaṇadoḷu gaṁgānvayakkī tiḷāggamagaḷuṟamene varddhamānamuni mukhyarddhāriṇīcakradoḷu . © .
Avara śiṣyarvvidyānaṁdasvāmigaḷu [Aṣṭōpavā]sidēvaruṁ parvvōpavāsidēvaruṁ guṇacaṁdrabhaṭṭārakaruṁ kukkuṭāṁgagaḷaivaruṁ .
baḷagāṟagaṇasarōvaranaḷināṁkargguptasamitīsayamayuktarakhiḷa gaḷenalaggaḷame śrīdha ra mū
nīṁdrarapagatataṁtraru . Atisayacaṁdrakīrtti munirājatōpavanarāja guṇamēghacaṁdra munivākya ya
sthamarājahaṁsanū guṇamatsaraṁ sukavivatsanujvaḷakīrtti bhāratīpatiyene ṁ paramatinavaṁ śrutakīrtthidēvan
Avara śiṣya nēmicaṁdrabhaṭṭārakadēvaru . śrīdharabudhanamarēṁdramahīdharadhairyya vinaya hridaya dhaka
raṁ sukhamayanidhisādhakanātaḷave nēmicaṁdramunīṁdra . Avara saha ḷu vāsupūjya traividyadēvaru
nnatabhūpāḷatikirīṭakōṭikiraṇavyālīḍhapādāṁbujadvitayaṁ paṁḍitamaṁḍaḷa prakaṭitāsāvartti kīrtyaṁganāpati hrijjāta
kujātakhaṁḍanakuṭāravāgvadhu bhaya ti graṇi vāsupūjyanesedaṁ rāddhāṁta ca krēsvaraṁ . Avara sahadharmmi
gaḷu maleyāḷapaṁḍitadēvaru . maṭṭaviru vādi haribaḷa niṁnaṭṭe yaliṭṭa ṭṭaḷipavādinivahagharaṭṭaṁ
śrīkumudacaṁdrapaṁḍitadēvaṁ . Avara śiṣyaru vāsupūjyabhaṭṭārakadēvaru . Uditaśrīvara mūḷasaṁghade baḷa
tkārōnnatōdyaduguṇāsvādadiṁ sannucārusaccharitadi prakhyātivettirddu sanumudadiṁ śrī jinadharmmamaṁ pasarisu
tattatapaśriyavoppidanī dhātrige vāsupūjyamunipaṁ madhyānakaḷpadrumaṁ . Avara śiṣyaru . sruta vi
dyānidhiyatipatinuta padmaprabhamunīsarāddhāṁta saṁvitatayasanudeyacaṁdrabratiyesa vaṁ saccharitra
guṇaniḷeyaruṁ . Avara śiṣyaru prabhuguṇagaṇasaṁbhūtinubhayanayāgamavicāra sāhityakaḷāvibhavā
ḷaṁkritanesavaṁ tribhuvanadēvaṁ manōjavigrahaśīḷaṁ . Avara guḍḍaru . balavaṁtarvvinayānvi targguṇagaṇāḷaṁkāra
ja sudhākararssakaḷasāhityākararssatukaḷākaḷitācāravicāracārucaritarssaddharmmanisādhakarkkulavaṁtarmma paṭṭi
ppainūrvvaraṁ pōlvarāru . mattamavaroḷagrajaputraṁ . Enitaṁ permmegēneṁnaḍa parikisaluvaḷunyaraṁ seṭṭimaṁḍana
cūḍāmaṇi gaṁgiseṭṭiyidoḷeṁ saujaṁnyare puṇyabhājanar cārucaritrasaṁpa dapaduprāgalbhyare kīttīvarddhanare sadguṇavaṁtare
saṁhitabyāpārasaṁpaṁnnare . tatsati . pati negaḻda sati seṭṭiya sati sajjanasūre satyasaṁpada sītāpatidānamānaguṇa
yute negaḻdaḷu nāgiyakkanavanītaḷadoḷu . śrīmatu maiḷalamahādēviyaru . śrīvīra permmāḍidēvaru gōveya
nelavīḍinoḷu sukhasaṁkathāvinōdadiṁ rājyaṁ geyyuttamire tatpādapadmōpajīvi . śrīmanmahāpradhanaṁ haḍapavaḷaṁ sēnādi mahāpracaṁḍadaṁḍanāya
yyaṁgaḷuṁ śrīmatu maiyiḷā dēviyaru śrīma kiṟusaṁpagāḍiyalu gaṁgiseṭṭiyara
māḍisida basadige kaliyuga 4283 neya manmathasaṁvatsarada phālguṇa su 13 brahaspativāradandu Avara magaṁ ma
lliseṭṭidēviseṭṭimadhuraseṭṭiyarusōmagrahaṇanimittavāgiśrīnēmicaṁdrabhaṭṭārakadēvara śiṣyaru śrī vāsupūjyabha
ṭṭārakadēvara pādaprakṣālanaṁ māḍi dēvara Aṣṭavidhārcanakaṁ riśiyara Āhāradānakkaṁ jīrṇnōddhārakaṁ basa
dige koṭṭa keyya sīmāsaṁmmaṁdhaveṁtene paḍuvalu hobbaraṇeyiṁ baḍagalu hāṇadiyiṁ
mūḍalu karabhūmiya huṇiseya maradiṁ dāḍakaṇiya teṁkalu mattamā basadige dēvara naṁdādīvigege biṭṭa gāṇamene
ri mūla paḍuvalu 21 keyya nivēśaṇa mattaṁ Aynūrvvaru biṭṭa dharmameṁtene Āne māṇika paḷi paṭhṭhāvaḷi Aḍake meḷa
sudhāṁnyavasavēnādoḍaṁ Ā sthaḷadalu vikrayavādoḍa hoṁge kāṇi . mattayinūrvvaru basadige biṭṭa dharmmameṁteṁdoḍe
sthānika katavenāḍoḍa Ayvatu Āge māṇikayaṁ hēridoḍe sarvvabādhe parihāra . Īntī dharmmamaṁnāvanādo
ḍaṁ pratipāḷipaṁge gaṁge vāraṇāsiyalu śehaśrakavileyaṁ dānaṁ geyda phalamaneyduvaru . mudadiṁdī (di) dharmmamaṁ kādavargge
siddhi lakṣmīvaṁśābhyudeyaṁ dīrghāyu yadaḷida kaṣṭāge duṣṭāge saṁtānaveredu Āyyukyayaṁ śrī Aḷiva
pātakaṁgakkumaṁtapparu taṁtāniradaḷdu narakadoḷa muḍimuḷkāḍuttirkkuṁ . svadattaṁ paradattaṁ vā
rēti vasundharā śaṣṭivarṣasahaśrāṇi viṣṭāyāṁ jayatē krimi .
Digital edition of SII 35.61 by automatically converted to DHARMA conventions.
